raw: {"questions":[{"label":"Set the scene","name":"What's been most on your mind in your design work lately?","description":"Safe opener that lets Carlos set context before the review gets specific.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"self_read","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Quality bar","name":"When you say a brand design is good, what tells you it's good?","description":"Surfaces Carlos's current internal quality standard and whether it is concrete enough to guide decisions.","purpose":"competency","stage":"evidence","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Feedback to action","name":"What changed in your work after the last round of feedback?","description":"Checks whether feedback translated into a visible behavior change rather than staying abstract.","purpose":"competency","stage":"evidence","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Concrete example","name":"Can you walk me through one recent piece where you had to make a quality trade-off?","description":"Looks for a specific decision point that reveals how he applies the quality bar under pressure.","purpose":"competency","stage":"evidence","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Expectation gap","name":"Where do my expectations for your work feel different from yours right now?","description":"Names alignment gaps without assuming the answer, and makes the mismatch discussable.","purpose":"topic","stage":"gap_naming","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Quality friction","name":"What part of the quality bar feels hardest to apply consistently?","description":"Finds the specific place where standards break down in practice.","purpose":"competency","stage":"gap_naming","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Growth blocker","name":"What is getting in the way of the next skill you want to build?","description":"Surfaces the real constraint on near-term development, whether it's skill, context, or habit.","purpose":"topic","stage":"cause","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Reliability signal","name":"When a commitment starts to slip, what do you usually notice first?","description":"Probes early warning signs and whether he can spot and surface slippage before it lands badly.","purpose":"competency","stage":"cause","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Support needed","name":"What kind of feedback would help you improve fastest this month?","description":"Identifies the most useful feedback format and cadence for his near-term development.","purpose":"topic","stage":"cause","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Two-week focus","name":"What's the first concrete change you want to make before we meet again?","description":"Closes on a specific commitment with a near-term behavioral change.","purpose":"competency","stage":"commit","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]}]}
